etymology.description: semantic 木(木) (mù, "wood") + phonetic 分(分) (fēn) -> luxuriant
etymology.interpretation: The character 棼 (fén, "luxuriant") combines 木(木) (mù, "wood") as the semantic component, indicating a connection to growing plants or trees, with 分(分) (fēn) as the phonetic component supplying the sound. The image evokes the sense of trees or wood being abundant or luxuriant.
